display.purpose: Marketing hero on / and /about only; never inside the app.

headline.purpose: Page titles and dashboard section heads.

title.purpose: Card titles, table group heads, nav links.

body.purpose: Default UI text and prose (cap prose at 65-75ch).

label.purpose: Chips, table column headers, button text; short, never all-caps sentences.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, popovers, mobile menu. Cool-ink based, not pure black.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards/tiles on hover only; faint blue ambient.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Most product state changes (hover, focus, selection).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action across the app. Action Blue, white text, AA-passing.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #FFFFFF; background: #0E6FC2; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0B5CA3; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #40B7FF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #CBD7E3; color: #365261; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Action Blue text on a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0E6FC2; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #CBD7E3; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #E0F3FF; border-color: #40B7FF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #40B7FF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Soft-fill badge for status (present/absent) or category. No heavy stroke.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 12px; background: #E0F3FF; color: #0B161E; } .ds-chip--success { background: #D1EDE0; color: #155737; } .ds-chip--danger { background: #FFE1DE; color: #841A1A; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat white surface on the cool background, separated by a hairline border, not a shadow.
components.html:
Sunday Service

1,847 checked in · +12.4%
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2EAF1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-card--interactive:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(14,111,194,0.12); } .ds-card__title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #0B161E; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card__meta { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #365261; margin: 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Surface field with a cool stroke; focus shifts to Action Blue with a brand ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #0B161E; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #CBD7E3; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; transition: border-color 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #365261; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #0E6FC2; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #40B7FF; }

components.name: Metric
components.description: A single key figure with label. Replaces the SaaS hero-metric template; used inline in context, not as a stat-card wall.
components.css: .ds-metric { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-metric__value { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.75rem; line-height: 1.1; color: #0B161E; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-metric__label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #365261; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation link; active route is Action Blue with medium weight.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #0B161E; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 2px; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #0E6FC2; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #0E6FC2; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #40B7FF; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: Attendify is a record you trust. A ministry leader opens it after service to read the week's attendance, the cells that grew, the VIPs who showed: the interface's only job is to make those numbers legible and honest at a glance. The Clear Ledger is calm, exact, and quiet. Data is the loudest thing on every screen; chrome recedes. This system is light, cool, and blue-true: surfaces are near-white tinted faintly toward the brand's own blue, one typeface (Inter) carries everything, and a single bright brand blue reads as accent while a deeper blue carries actions. It rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, clunky church admin software, sterile enterprise screens, and childish over-play.
keyCharacteristics: Cool blue-tinted near-white surfaces; blue-true neutrals, never warm or green.
One family (Inter), hierarchy through weight + scale, tabular figures for all data.
Flat by default; hairline cool borders carry separation, not shadows.
One bright brand blue used sparingly as accent; a deeper blue carries actions.
Numbers first, chrome last, on every screen.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Brand Bright (#40B7FF) is identity, not action. It appears on a small fraction of any screen (focus ring, one chart series, the wordmark). The moment it's carrying a button or a large fill, it's wrong; use Action Blue.

rules.name: The Cool Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral tints toward the brand's blue hue or stays at chroma 0. Warm or green near-whites are forbidden; the green-mint body background is retired.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only across the UI. Poppins, Hind, and the Material Roboto default are retired. A second family is permitted nowhere in the app.

rules.name: The Tabular Figures Rule
rules.body: Every number a leader compares uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so digits align and don't jitter between renders.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat with a hairline border. If you reach for a shadow on a resting element, use a border or the Surface Muted step instead. The retired blue-glow shadow-default is decorative; do not reintroduce it as a resting state.

rules.name: The One Button Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: The app mixes a custom app-button with Material mat-flat-button color=primary; that is two primary buttons, one is wrong. Standardize on a single Action Blue button everywhere.

dos: Do keep numbers first and chrome last: data is the loudest element on every screen.
Do use Action Blue (#0E6FC2) for actions and Brand Bright (#40B7FF) for identity/accent only.
Do tint every neutral toward blue or keep it chroma-0; surfaces are #F7FAFD / #FFFFFF.
Do set Inter everywhere and tabular-nums on all compared figures.
Do rest surfaces flat with hairline #E2EAF1 borders; reserve shadow for overlays and hover.
Do give every interactive component default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, and (where relevant) loading and error states.
Do use skeletons for loading content, and empty states that teach the screen.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS dashboard: no hero-metric template, no identical icon-heading-text card grids, no gradient text.
Don't look like clunky church admin software: no dated, beige, logbook-dense layouts.
Don't look sterile enterprise/government: no cold all-gray, joyless, over-formal screens.
Don't go childish/over-playful: no emoji soup or toy-like controls.
Don't put white text on Brand Bright (#40B7FF); it fails AA (~1.9:1). Use Action Blue.
Don't use a warm or green near-white; the green-mint #F8FDF8 background is retired.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px colored stripes on cards, alerts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section, or 01/02/03 numbered section markers.
Don't mix two primary-button styles; one button vocabulary, Action Blue.
Don't reintroduce the blue-glow shadow-default as a resting-state decoration.
